productDisplayName: Ed Hardy Men Grey Dial Watch
description: Tattoo artist ed hardy has taken the world by storm with his funky, urban brand - from rock stars to Hollywood legends, those who have a quirky taste in fashion love the tattoo inspired designs. Wear this watch to prove you're a style maverick not a trend follower. Case diameter: 44 mm Case thickness: 7 mm Dial shape: Round Warranty: 2 years Black stainless steel round case Black textured genuine leather strap with a tang clasp Grey printed dial with copper hands ed hardy branding on the dial Date aperture on the dial Screw to reset time Solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durability Water resistance up to 100 meters, wearable around sinks, during swimming, poolside diving but not highboard diving and surfing
